message.content:
# WordPress Frontend Hero Section: Detailed Breakdown

## Overall Layout
The hero section occupies the full width of the page, positioned below the top navigation bar. It features a full-width background image with overlaid text and a call-to-action button, creating a visually striking focal point for the website.

## Visual Elements

### Background Image
- **Content**: A lifestyle photograph showing a woman in a beige/tan coat walking on a Parisian street
- **Style**: High-resolution, shallow depth of field with blurred background
- **Atmosphere**: Autumnal setting with golden-hour lighting, trees with fall foliage, and urban architecture
- **Composition**: Woman positioned slightly off-center, looking to the side

### Text Elements
1. **Category Label** (top-left):
   - Text: "NOUVELLE COLLECTION"
   - Style: Uppercase, light brown/gold color, small font size
   - Position: Above the main headline

2. **Main Headline**:
   - Text: "L'Elegance Minimaliste"
   - Style: Large, bold, white/cream color
   - Typography: Modern serif font
   - Position: Left-aligned, prominent placement

3. **Subheadline**:
   - Text: "Nouvelle Collection Automne 2026"
   - Style: Smaller font, lighter weight, white/cream color
   - Position: Below the main headline

### Call-to-Action Button
- **Text**: "DECOUVRIR" (Discover)
- **Style**: Black background with white text
- **Design**: Rectangular with clean edges, positioned below the subheadline
- **Hover State**: Likely has a hover effect (not visible in static image)

### Layout Structure
- **Text Alignment**: Left-aligned text block positioned over the left portion of the image
- **Visual Hierarchy**: Clear hierarchy with headline as most prominent element
- **Spacing**: Generous padding around text elements for readability
- **Color Contrast**: Strong contrast between text (light) and background (darker tones)

## Additional Context
This hero section is part of a fashion e-commerce website (Velure brand) and serves to promote their new Autumn 2026 collection with a minimalist elegance theme. The design effectively combines lifestyle imagery with promotional text to engage visitors and encourage exploration of the new collection.
